techs.name: War Academy
techs.description: The heart of military research. Unlock advanced technologies.

techs.name: Truegold Battalion
techs.description: Truegold enhances the command abilities of heroes and increases Squads' Deployment Capacity.

techs.name: Truegold Shields
techs.description: The command alloys of Truegold-forged shields increase Infantry Health.

techs.name: Truegold Blades
techs.description: Every aspect of Truegold enhanced weaponry increases Infantry Lethality.

techs.name: Truegold Legionaries
techs.description: Truegold enhances the command abilities of heroes and increases the Rally Squad Capatiy.

techs.name: Truegold Mauls
techs.description: Superior quality and speed are synonymous on the field, improving Infantry Attack.

techs.name: Truegold Plating
techs.description: Truegold armor is the most elite available, increasing Infantry Defense.

techs.name: Truegold Infantry
techs.description: With a Truegold arsenal by your side, the Barracks can deploy even more powerful Infantry.

techs.name: Truegold Infantry Healing
techs.description: Truegold has a restorative effect all its own, reducing healing costs on Truegold Infantry.

techs.name: Truegold Infantry Aid
techs.description: Truegold has a powerful restorative effect on the human body, accelerating Truegold Infantry healing.

techs.name: Truegold Infantry Training
techs.description: A modernized Truegold production line reduces Truegold Infantry training costs.
